title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 351.820 - Execution of documents in more than one capacity
text:
351.820.  Execution of documents in more than one capacity. — Notwithstanding any law to the contrary, an individual who holds more than one office in a statutory close corporation may execute, acknowledge, or verify in more than one capacity any document required to be executed, acknowledged, or verified by the holders of two or more offices.
(L. 1990 H.B. 1432)
